summary: Iteration 3: Frontend-only testing of refactored React hooks. All hook dependency changes verified working. Login->Dashboard->Pentest Wizard flow tested end-to-end successfully.

code_quality.issue: Unnecessary deps in useWebSocketHeartbeat: WEBSOCKET_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS, WebSocketCtor are module constants (never change)
code_quality.recommendation: Remove from dependency array - they are stable module-level values

code_quality.issue: Unnecessary deps: backendUrl is module constant, reconnectRef/setMessages are refs/setters (stable)
code_quality.recommendation: Can be removed but harmless - ESLint exhaustive-deps may flag if removed

code_quality.issue: useMemo with apiFetch as dep is unnecessary - apiFetch is imported module function (stable)
code_quality.recommendation: Can simplify to direct use of apiFetch without useMemo wrapper

code_quality.issue: terminalRef in useEffect deps is unnecessary - refs have stable identity

critical_code_review_comments: All hook refactors are functionally correct - no breaking changes detected
useWebSocket: Heartbeat cleanup works correctly, reconnect logic stable with useRef pattern
useSessionBootstrap: Cancelled flag pattern prevents state updates after unmount - correct implementation
usePentestWizardController: All callbacks (create/authorize/start/stop) work correctly with react-query mutations
LiveTerminal: Auto-scroll effect triggers correctly on new messages
Minor: Some dependency arrays include stable values (module constants, refs) - harmless but could be cleaner
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 hook stability items verified working. Pentest wizard flow tested: login -> navigate to /pentests -> select target -> switch modes -> create pentest -> LiveTerminal connects -> start/stop pentest. WebSocket connection establishes successfully. Minor console warnings about WebSocket closing early are expected when stopping pentest quickly.

frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - credentials work, redirects to dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_render: PASS - stats cards, quick actions, live activity visible

pentest_wizard.mode_switching: PASS - Manual/AI Agent toggle updates UI correctly
pentest_wizard.create_pentest: PASS - API call succeeds, pentestId set, buttons enabled

live_terminal.auto_scroll: PASS - effect triggers on messages array change

hook_stability_verification.useWebSocket: PASS - reconnect logic stable, heartbeat cleanup works
hook_stability_verification.useSessionBootstrap: PASS - session check on mount, cancelled flag prevents stale updates
hook_stability_verification.usePentestWizardController: PASS - all state updates and mutations work correctly
hook_stability_verification.LiveTerminal_auto_scroll: PASS - scrolls to bottom on new messages
